<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Describe the situation where you needed it. -->

<!-- How would you like the feature to work? Show the ideal API if applicable. -->

```zsh
# Example of how you'd use the new feature
z::log::your_new_function "example"
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why are they insufficient? -->

- [ ] No, I'm requesting it for someone else to implement
